name: Astera Labs, Inc.
description: Astera Labs, Inc. is a leader in purpose-built connectivity solutions for data-centric systems. The company designs and develops semiconductor-based connectivity solutions, including its Intelligent Connectivity Platform, which comprises PCIe, CXL, and Ethernet semiconductor products, to unleash the full potential of artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure. Its products are designed to address critical performance bottlenecks in high-performance computing and modern data centers.
